name: swcnt-mobile-lite
description: SWCNT lightweight mobile app packaged with Capacitor

scripts.build:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html styles.css app.js manifest.webmanifest sw.js www/ && cp -R assets www/assets && cp -R data www/data
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:web && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android:build:debug:ci: npm run build:web && npx cap copy android && cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleDebug --stacktrace
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
